findings.detail: No required fields — all input is optional in tool "list_devices"

Server exposes no authentication-related tools — may accept unauthenticated connections
Tool "list_devices" has no description. LLM will infer behavior entirely from the name — unpredictable tool usage.
Tool name "control_device" is ambiguous — "control" could mean read, create, update, or delete. LLM may choose the most destructive interpretation.
Tool "control_device" has no description. LLM will infer behavior entirely from the name — unpredictable tool usage.
